activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception - not activated
General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.motivation: The consignor named 'AB Volvo Penta' with address in Gothenburg, Sweden in certificate matches the issuer 'AB Volvo Penta' with matching address in Gothenburg, Sweden in the invoice. The consignor name appears identically in both documents (after normalization). The country 'Sweden' matches exactly per rule 4.1.4. The company is confirmed as the same legal entity.

consignee.motivation: The consignee named 'ORASCOM FREE ZONE EL AMIRIA ALEXANDRIA Egypt' in the certificate clearly matches the consignee part in the invoice with identical name and country Egypt. The name appears identically after normalization and the country matches exactly. Consignee is verified against invoice's consignee field as primary recipient.

goods_description.motivation: The certificate contains a general goods description and an explicit invoice reference 'See attached invoice:61622218/1S, dated: 25/02/2026'. The invoice number and date match exactly. The invoice contains a similar but more specific goods description 'Marine Leisure Diesel Engine & Accessories'. Per rule 4.3.5, general goods description with invoice reference validates the goods description.

quantity.motivation: Certificate states Gross Weight (GW) 4469 KG which matches the invoice total gross weight 4469.00 KG exactly. Units and numeric value match exactly with allowed normalization including decimal truncation. Quantity is therefore verified according to 4.4.4.

origin.certificate_value: FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL, TW
origin.invoice_value: The exporter of the products covered by this document (customs authorization No. SE/TTA/013168) declares that, except where otherwise clearly indicated, these products are of EU preferential origin.
origin.motivation: Certificate specifies multiple origin countries including several EU members (FR, DK, SE, LT, SK, IT, PL) and Taiwan (TW). Invoice states the products are of EU preferential origin without contradicting the certificate's countries. Per EU origin normalization rules 4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2, multiple EU origins plus preferential origin declaration match certificate's origins. Taiwan as non-EU is declared in certificate and not contradicted.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points match between the certificate and invoice with allowed normalizations and clear references. No discrepancies found.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
